info.title: Turbiine
info.author: Daniel K. O.
info.details:
This is an Aroma plugin to turn any Wii U controller into a turbo controller.

Usage:

Press the toggle button combo (e.g. TV + ZL on the Gamepad).
Press a button; it will toggle between normal and turbo mode.

Note: Turbo action is disabled every time you start a game, or return to the Wii U Menu.

changelog:
1.1
Turbo action is now based on time (milliseconds) instead of samples.
The core code was rewritten, and hopefully should work for more games.
Pre-release versions of 1.1 were depending on a modified ButtonComboModule to work properly. The final release is compatible with the official ButtonComboModule.
